':'')+(r.tags?r.tags.map(function(t){return ''+t+''}).join(''):'');return c}function addCards(cards){cards.forEach(function(r,i){var c=mkCard(r);pj.insertBefore(c,sentinel);seen[r.name]=1;setTimeout(function(){c.classList.add('vis')},i*100)})}var sentinel=document.createElement('div');sentinel.style.cssText='flex:0 0 1px;height:1px';pj.appendChild(sentinel);addCards(featured);var maxPage=3,done=false;function stopFetching(reason){done=true;obs.disconnect();if(reason){var el=document.createElement('span');el.style.cssText='flex:0 0 auto;font-size:.5rem;color:rgba(247,248,248,.12);padding:0 1rem;white-space:nowrap;align-self:center';el.textContent=reason;pj.insertBefore(el,sentinel)}}var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){if(entries[0].isIntersecting&&!loading&&!done){loading=true;fetch('https://api.github.com/users/robbiepryan/repos?per_page=30&sort=updated&page='+page).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error(r.status);return r.json()}).then(function(repos){var newCards=repos.filter(function(r){return!r.fork&&!seen[r.name]}).map(function(r){return{name:r.name,url:r.html_url,desc:r.description||'',tags:[r.language].filter(Boolean),color:langColors[r.language]||'',stars:r.stargazers_count}});if(newCards.length){addCards(newCards);page++}if(!newCards.length||page>maxPage){stopFetching(page>maxPage?'':'All projects loaded')}loading=false}).catch(function(){loading=false;stopFetching('Could not load more')})}},{root:pj,rootMargin:'0px 300px 0px 0px'});obs.observe(sentinel)
